title: Attach Shared Drive Files

posts.author: groovyruth (Ruth Burcaw)
posts.cookedHtml: Still learning Monday.com but am really liking it so far! I just connect to Google Drive as I wanted easier access to a specific file I create and update weekly in prep for a staff meeting. It resides on a shared drive that is part of our Google Workspace account. I can’t access it from the File column. That sure would be helpful, as most of my work files are in Google Drive.

posts.author: Benr (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml: Bump - proper Google Shared Drive integration is a huge missing feature. Linking to files on Google Shared Drive workaround is way to many button presses to expect adherence from staff and the result is file duplication when the Google Shared Drive is intended to be system of record for content management.
